name: shadcn-calendar-custom-days
title: Calendar Custom Days
author: shadcn
description: Adds caller-rendered metadata to selectable calendar days.

changes: Changed generated style imports to bundled relative paths.
Lifted the fixed range and price labels into defaultRange, onRangeChange, and renderDayMeta props.
Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and RTL transform to the authored Radix base file.
Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports where present.
Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and RTL transform to the authored Radix base file.
Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports where present.
Disabled transform transitions under reduced motion.
Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and RTL transform to the authored Radix base file.
Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports where present.
Removed the unrelated Next-specific absoluteUrl helper and retained only the cn helper required by this item.

modifications.change: Changed generated style imports to bundled relative paths. Lifted the fixed range and price labels into defaultRange, onRangeChange, and renderDayMeta props.
modifications.reason: Expose the copied composition as a reusable, portable component while preserving its interaction and rendering model.

modifications.change: Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and RTL transform to the authored Radix base file. Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports where present.
modifications.reason: Reproduce the example's pinned style closure with portable imports and required RTL, accessibility, or reduced-motion behavior.

modifications.change: Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and RTL transform to the authored Radix base file. Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports where present. Disabled transform transitions under reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Reproduce the example's pinned style closure with portable imports and required RTL, accessibility, or reduced-motion behavior.

modifications.change: Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and RTL transform to the authored Radix base file. Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports where present.
modifications.reason: Reproduce the example's pinned style closure with portable imports and required RTL, accessibility, or reduced-motion behavior.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated Next-specific absoluteUrl helper.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure limited to the cn helper used by the installed component and avoid a Next environment dependency.
